rationale: Elec. Code §254.121 governs contents of campaign treasurer reports for specific-purpose committees. It is unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: In addition to the contents required by Section 254.031, each report by a campaign treasurer of a specific-purpose committee must include:
_note: Rule text concerns campaign finance reporting; proposed change concerns property tax exemptions. No interaction.
